description_long: This is a compact, stone-built public fountain with a semi-circular basin set into a thick, arched stone wall. The structure features a pitched, moss-covered roof made of stone slabs, giving it a rustic and weathered appearance. The front face has a recessed arch with a single spout above the basin, and the stonework is composed of large, roughly hewn blocks. The basin is bowl-shaped and projects outward, supported by a solid stone base. The rear and sides of the fountain are enclosed by the same stonework, with a pipe or drainage feature visible at the back. The ground around the fountain is a mix of paving and exposed earth, with some grass and moss growth at the base.
description: A rustic stone fountain with a semi-circular basin, arched back, and mossy pitched roof, set on a paved and earthy base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched stone wall, central spout, and bowl-shaped basin beneath the pitched roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curve of the stone wall and the depth of the basin, with the roof's overhang visible.
description_view_2: Rear oblique view showing the back of the arched structure, some graffiti, and the continuation of the stonework.
description_view_3: Right rear view displaying the drainage pipe at the back and the full extent of the mossy roof.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain features a simple, rustic design with no elaborate ornamentation. The stonework is rough-hewn and weathered, with some moss growth adding a natural decorative touch. There is a recessed arch above the basin, but no visible engravings or sculptural motifs.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is semi-circular, bowl-shaped, and projects outward from the main stone wall. It has a thick rim and appears to be a single tier with no internal divisions.
attribute_surrounding_landscaping: The fountain is set on a paved area with some exposed earth and patches of grass and moss at the base. No visible planters, benches, or additional landscaping features are present.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: A single spout is centered above the basin, suggesting a straightforward, downward water flow with no visible jets or spray patterns.
